message:
fix: resolve Section 12 gate GATE-RISK-COVERAGE failure, add 13 unit_tests.txt and 9 check reports

- Fix scenario_effectiveness in check_section_12_gate.py to recognize
  effectiveness checks named with countermeasure/mitigation/gate/control
  keywords, not just "scenario" — all 12 Section 12 beads now PASS
- Generate unit_tests.txt for 13 beads across sections 10.12, 10.17, 10.18
- Generate 9 missing check_report.json via existing check scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
